# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security


snapshot:
  repository:
    s3:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: my-elasticsearch-snapshots
        region: us-east-1
        endpoint: s3.amazonaws.com
        access_key: ${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}
        secret_key: ${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}
        compress: true
        concurrent_streams: 5
        chunk_size: 100mb
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
    fs:
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: /mnt/elasticsearch/snapshots
        compress: true
        concurrent_streams: 5
        chunk_size: 100mb
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
  schedule:
    daily:
      cron: "0 0 * * *"
      repository: s3
      retention:
        expire_after: 30d
        min_count: 1
        max_count: 30
    weekly:
      cron: "0 0 * * 0"
      repository: fs
      retention:
        expire_after: 90d
        min_count: 1
        max_count: 12
  settings:
    snapshot:
      include_global_state: true
      ignore_unavailable: true
      wait_for_completion: true
      max_wait_time: 30m
      max_wait_for_completion: 30m
      max_wait_for_snapshot: 30m
      max_wait_for_restore: 30m
      max_wait_for_delete: 30m
      max_wait_for_recover: 30m
      max_wait_for_shard: 30m
      max_wait_for_node: 30m
      max_wait_for_cluster: 30m
      max_wait_for_master: 30m
      max_wait_for_nodes: 30m
      max_wait_for_shards: 30m
      max_wait_for_indices: 30m
      max_wait_for_index: 30m
      max_wait_for_snapshot_state: 30m
      max_wait_for_snapshot_status: 30m
      max_wait_for_snapshot_completion: 30m
      max_wait_for_snapshot_deletion: 30m
      max_wait_for_snapshot_restoration: 30m
      max_wait_for_snapshot_recovery: 30m
      max_wait_for_snapshot_recover: 30m
